sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95990" key="spoggodete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπογγο-δετέω</orth>, <sense id="n95990.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fasten a sponge over</tr_> the eye, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:22:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
